name: recipe-finder-ai
description: Recipe search and meal planning. Find recipes by ingredients, get substitutions, plan meals, and estimate nutrition. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: find_recipe
tools.description: Find recipes matching available ingredients. Ingredients as comma-separated string.

tools.name: substitute_ingredient
tools.description: Get ingredient substitutions, optionally filtered by dietary preference.

tools.name: plan_weekly_meals
tools.description: Generate a weekly meal plan based on preferences.

tools.name: estimate_nutrition
tools.description: Estimate approximate nutritional content from ingredient list (comma-separated).
